items.title: Tell me if you've seen this before: "Today is a hard day.
items.title_zh: 告诉我您以前是否见过这样的情况：“今天是艰难的一天。
items.description: Tell me if you've seen this before: "Today is a hard day. We've made the difficult decision to cut 1,000+ employees. Our business has never been stronger, but AI has changed how we work..." Whenever I read one of these, I mentally translat…
items.description_zh: 告诉我，您是否曾经看过这样的内容：“今天是艰难的一天。我们做出了裁员 1,000 多名员工的艰难决定。我们的业务从未如此强大，但人工智能改变了我们的工作方式……”每当我读到其中一篇文章时，我都会在心里翻译……

items.description: Legacy media besmirches itself when it quotes people who personally benefit from more fentanyl tourism Defund nonprofits that support people doing drugs until they die. Fund recovery and treatment in SF and everywhere in on the West Coast…
items.description_zh: 当传统媒体引用那些从更多芬太尼旅游中受益的人的言论时，它就给自己带来了污点。 取消资助那些支持人们吸毒直至死亡的非营利组织。旧金山和西海岸各地的资金回收和治疗......
